mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO CHARGE_RESULT ( RESULT_ID, CONTRACT_ID, CHARGE_ITEM_CODE, CHARGE_ITEM_NAME, CHARGE_ITEM_TYPE, AMOUNT, CURRENCY_CODE, CREATED_AT )
SELECT SYS_GUID(), #{contractId}, #{item.chargeItemCode}, #{item.chargeItemName}, #{item.chargeItemType, typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.EnumTypeHandler}, #{item.amount}, #{item.currencyCode}, SYSTIMESTAMP FROM DUAL
mapper.update: MERGE INTO CHARGE_PROCESSING_STATUS cps USING (SELECT #{chargeItemId} AS CONTRACT_STEP_KEY FROM DUAL) src ON (cps.CONTRACT_ID || '|' || cps.STEP_ID = src.CONTRACT_STEP_KEY) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET STATUS = #{status, typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.EnumTypeHandler}, PROCESSED_AT = SYSTIMESTAMP WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (PROCESSING_ID, CONTRACT_ID, STEP_ID, STATUS, PROCESSED_AT) VALUES (SYS_GUID(), SUBSTR(#{chargeItemId}, 1, INSTR(#{chargeItemId}, '|') - 1), SUBSTR(#{chargeItemId}, INSTR(#{chargeItemId}, '|') + 1), #{status, typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.EnumTypeHandler}, SYSTIMESTAMP)
